description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build-test that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, macos-12, windows-2019) with various configurations (install mdns, use conan, force cpprest asio, dns-sd mode, enable authorization). For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.8, install dependencies, and perform OS-specific setup.
